lines.speaker: Zul-Aniel
lines.text: It's not often that we see more humans in this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you come to be here?

lines.speaker: Zul-Aniel
lines.text: General Hining sent us out in a scouting party. We got separated from the rest, and became completely lost. Soon we ran out of rations.

lines.speaker: Zul-Aniel
lines.text: Eventually we stumbled upon this place. They saw we were starving, and allowed us to eat of their sacred eels if we vowed to serve Zulrah.

lines.speaker: Zul-Aniel
lines.text: Since then, we've settled here. We went back up north once, to see how the king's campaign was going, but they drove us out of the camp, calling us unclean.

lines.speaker: Zul-Aniel
lines.text: It's probably the sacred eels that did it. They change you, you know. Once you've tasted them, you're part of the tribe forever.
